Package calendar.model

Interface MultiCalendarManagerInterface

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    GuiMultiCalendarManagerMockModel, MultiCalendarManager, MultiCalendarManagerMockModel
    public interface MultiCalendarManagerInterface
    This interface contains necessary operations that a Multi Calendar Manager should support.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void copyEvent​(java.lang.String subject, java.lang.String startDateTime, java.lang.String targetCalendarName, java.lang.String targetDateTime)
      To copy a single event with given start date/time from one calendar entity to another calendar entity falling on specific target date/time.
      void copyEventsBetweenDays​(java.lang.String startDate, java.lang.String endDate, java.lang.String targetCalendarName, java.lang.String targetDay)
      To copy multiple events from a start date to an end date from one calendar entity to another calendar entity falling on the specific target start day.
      void copyEventsOnThatDay​(java.lang.String specificDate, java.lang.String targetCalendarName, java.lang.String targetDay)
      To copy multiple events on the specific date from one calendar entity to another calendar entity falling on specific target day.
      CalendarEntityInterface createCalendar​(java.lang.String calendarName, java.lang.String timeZone)
      To create a calendar entity with name and timezone.
      CalendarEntityInterface editCalendar​(java.lang.String calendarName, java.lang.String property, java.lang.String propertyValue)
      To update a property of the calendar entity with new value.
      java.util.Collection<CalendarEntityInterface> getAllCalendars()
      Get all the calendar entities in the manager.
      CalendarEntityInterface getCalendarEntity​(java.lang.String calendarName)
      To get a calendar entity with given name.
      java.time.ZoneId getCalendarTimeZone​(java.lang.String calendarName)
      To get the timezone of the calendar entity with given name.
      CalendarEntityInterface getCurrentCalendarEntity()
      To get the current calendar entity after use.
      java.util.Collection<EventWrapper> getEventsAcrossCalendar​(java.lang.String keyword)
      Get the event collection of events with subject matching the given keyword.
      void useThisCalendarEntity​(CalendarEntityInterface calendarEntity)
      To designate the calendarEntity as the context calendar entity.

    • Method Detail

      • createCalendar

        CalendarEntityInterface createCalendar​(java.lang.String calendarName,
                                       java.lang.String timeZone)
        To create a calendar entity with name and timezone.
        Parameters:
        calendarName - the name of the calendar entity
        timeZone - the timezone of the calendar entity
        Returns:
        the calendar entity with name and timezone

      • editCalendar

        CalendarEntityInterface editCalendar​(java.lang.String calendarName,
                                     java.lang.String property,
                                     java.lang.String propertyValue)
        To update a property of the calendar entity with new value.
        Parameters:
        calendarName - the name of the calendar entity
        property - the property of the calendar entity
        propertyValue - the new value of the property
        Returns:
        the new calendar entity with name and timezone

      • getCurrentCalendarEntity

        CalendarEntityInterface getCurrentCalendarEntity()
        To get the current calendar entity after use.
        Returns:
        the current calendar entity

      • getCalendarEntity

        CalendarEntityInterface getCalendarEntity​(java.lang.String calendarName)
        To get a calendar entity with given name.
        Parameters:
        calendarName - the name of the calendar entity
        Returns:
        the CalendarEntity with that name

      • getCalendarTimeZone

        java.time.ZoneId getCalendarTimeZone​(java.lang.String calendarName)
        To get the timezone of the calendar entity with given name.
        Parameters:
        calendarName - the name of the calendar entity
        Returns:
        the timezone of the calendar entity

      • useThisCalendarEntity

        void useThisCalendarEntity​(CalendarEntityInterface calendarEntity)
        To designate the calendarEntity as the context calendar entity.
        Parameters:
        calendarEntity - the context calendar entity

      • copyEvent

        void copyEvent​(java.lang.String subject,
               java.lang.String startDateTime,
               java.lang.String targetCalendarName,
               java.lang.String targetDateTime)
        To copy a single event with given start date/time from one calendar entity to another calendar entity falling on specific target date/time.
        Parameters:
        subject - the subject of the single event
        startDateTime - the start date/time of the event to-be-copied
        targetCalendarName - the name of the target calendar entity
        targetDateTime - the target date/time of the target calendar entity

      • copyEventsOnThatDay

        void copyEventsOnThatDay​(java.lang.String specificDate,
                         java.lang.String targetCalendarName,
                         java.lang.String targetDay)
        To copy multiple events on the specific date from one calendar entity to another calendar entity falling on specific target day.
        Parameters:
        specificDate - the start day on which the multiple events start
        targetCalendarName - the name of the target calendar entity
        targetDay - the target date of the target calendar entity

      • copyEventsBetweenDays

        void copyEventsBetweenDays​(java.lang.String startDate,
                           java.lang.String endDate,
                           java.lang.String targetCalendarName,
                           java.lang.String targetDay)
        To copy multiple events from a start date to an end date from one calendar entity to another calendar entity falling on the specific target start day.
        Parameters:
        startDate - the start day on which the multiple events start
        endDate - the end day on which the multiple events start
        targetCalendarName - the name of the target calendar entity
        targetDay - the target date of the target calendar entity

      • getAllCalendars

        java.util.Collection<CalendarEntityInterface> getAllCalendars()
        Get all the calendar entities in the manager.
        Returns:
        the collection of calendar entities

      • getEventsAcrossCalendar

        java.util.Collection<EventWrapper> getEventsAcrossCalendar​(java.lang.String keyword)
        Get the event collection of events with subject matching the given keyword.
        Parameters:
        keyword - the searching keyword for matching the event subject
        Returns:
        a collection of events with subject matching the given keyword
